data.title: Write RED tests for review-huge-diff-check.sh and wire .test-index
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create `tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh` with 6 test functions covering the threshold check script's behavior. Add RED markers to .test-index.

## Tasks
1. Create `tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh` with test functions:
   - `test_huge_diff_check_above_threshold`: git diff returns 25 files → script exits 2
   - `test_huge_diff_check_at_threshold`: git diff returns exactly 20 files → script exits 2 (boundary: threshold is inclusive)
   - `test_huge_diff_check_below_threshold`: git diff returns 19 files → script exits 0
   - `test_huge_diff_check_invalid_zero_threshold`: review.huge_diff_file_threshold=0 → script exits 1 with stderr
   - `test_huge_diff_check_invalid_negative_threshold`: review.huge_diff_file_threshold=-5 → script exits 1 with stderr
   - `test_huge_diff_check_excludes_test_index`: git diff returns 20 files including .test-index → script exits 0 (19 net files, below threshold)
2. Append to `.test-index`:
   `plugins/dso/scripts/review-huge-diff-check.sh: tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh [test_huge_diff_check_at_threshold] [test_huge_diff_check_excludes_test_index]`
3. Tests must mock `git diff --name-only HEAD` and `read-config.sh` outputs (no live git calls)
4. All 6 tests must be RED (fail) since the script does not exist yet

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] All 6 test functions are present and named as specified
- [ ] chmod +x applied after creation
- [ ] .test-index entry appended with both RED markers
- [ ] All tests fail with a clear error (RED confirmed)
- Verify: `bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL` outputs >= 6
